notableEvents.label: Josh Jung GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Josh Jung grounds into a double play, third baseman Matt Shaw to first baseman Michael Busch. Ezequiel Duran out at 3rd. Josh Jung out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Josh Jung rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Josh Jung grounds into a double play, third baseman Matt Shaw to first baseman Michael Busch. Ezequiel Duran out at 3rd. Josh Jung out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Danny Jansen plunked
notableEvents.detail: Danny Jansen hit by pitch. Joc Pederson to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Danny Jansen GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Rangers challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: Danny Jansen grounds into a double play, third baseman Matt Shaw to second baseman Nico Hoerner to first baseman Michael Busch. Alejandro Osuna out at 2nd. Danny Jansen out at 1st.
